title: Webhook-delivery contract (authored for the webhook-delivery testing task)
description: Each subject is documented so that registering a receiver at webhooks_path and then creating a resource at resource_path fires a 'resource.created' event delivered to the receiver within delivery_deadline_seconds, carrying the exact event_type, the created resource_id, an ISO-8601 timestamp, and an HMAC-SHA256 signature over the raw body keyed by the registered webhook_secret; a 500 from the receiver is retried. Agents construct the webhook test plan from this; ground truth is the live API's observed behavior. DummyJSON's source is never modified, ships NO webhook subsystem (no POST /webhooks route, no outbound delivery), and its POST /<x>/add endpoints are simulated, so the observed delivery behavior (no registration, no delivery, no signature) is the QA finding.
